parserNotes: Found 9 transactions for Citadel Share 0000 (joint savings account — Victoria Wise / Gabriel Cofre). Account opened 11/15/2025 with $5.00. This is a SEPARATE account from Victoria's main Citadel Star Savings (account 0000775668) — this is account 1070136-S0000, a new joint account. Primary activity: receiving $1,000 from Share 0070 in December, funding Share 0070 for utility bills (3 transfers: $200 + $100 + $400 = $700 total out), student loan payment of $600 on 01/21, and three monthly dividend credits ($0.04 + $0.05 + $0.03). Student loan same ID as Dec S0070 payment ($3,000) — combined $3,600 in student loan payments across both accounts in this period. Transfer pairs cross-reference S0070 exactly: PAIR_A ($1,000 12/20), PAIR_B ($200 01/03), PAIR_C ($100 01/05), PAIR_D ($400/$500 02/06/16 — amounts differ slightly; flagged). Closing balance $605.12 as of 02/28/2026.
